character_concepts: Otto, a friendly tidy desk-agent robot with a briefcase-shaped body, little white gloves and a helpful smile, who plans, browses and finishes whole projects end to end.
Query, a small hovering chatbot orb with a single glowing question mark that only ever answers one question then waits, polite but limited.
Wingfoot, an anthropomorphic winged airline luggage tag, zippy and upbeat, always ready for takeoff.

clips.image_prompt: Pixar-style 3D animation. Otto, a friendly tidy desk-agent robot with a briefcase body and little white gloves, politely answers one small floating question then sits still, while a towering stack of project boxes looms over a tired owner in the warm-lit office background, gentle wistful expression, vibrant family-film color grade, cinematic depth. Aspect Ratio 9:16.
clips.video_prompt: Slow push-in on Otto as he answers and goes quiet -> behind him the owner eyes a mountain of project boxes and slumps -> Voice (soft): for years, it answered your question, then stopped. -> SFX: a soft ding, a tired sigh.

clips.image_prompt: Pixar-style 3D animation. Otto the desk-agent robot rolls up his sleeves and races through a whole multi-step project, papers and browser windows swirling neatly around him into a tidy finished folder, a big wall clock behind him spinning from weeks to hours, the owner stepping away through a doorway, bright energetic lighting, focused delighted expression, vibrant family-film color grade, cinematic detail. Aspect Ratio 9:16.
clips.video_prompt: Fast montage orbit as Otto works -> windows and pages fly into a neat folder while the clock spins from weeks down to hours and the owner steps away -> Voice (rising, amazed): now it does the whole job while you are away. -> SFX: brisk shuffling, a whirring clock, a bright chime.

clips.image_prompt: Pixar-style 3D animation. Otto the desk-agent robot proudly hands a neat finished deliverable folder to the returning owner, who holds an approve stamp ready, a small hand-lettered sign nearby reads it finishes you sign off, warm evening office glow, satisfied honest expression, vibrant family-film color grade, cinematic lighting. Aspect Ratio 9:16.
clips.video_prompt: Slow push-in as Otto offers the finished folder -> the owner reviews it and presses an approve stamp before it ships -> Voice (warm, honest): it finishes the task, you still sign off. -> SFX: a paper flip, a firm approving stamp.

thumbnails: Pixar-style 3D animation. Extreme close-up of Otto the briefcase desk-agent robot beaming, a neat finished folder and a spinning weeks-to-hours clock reflected in his eyes, warm cinematic lighting, vibrant family-film color grade. Aspect Ratio 9:16.

Pixar-style 3D animation. Otto the desk-agent robot handing over a finished folder beside a small sign reading it finishes you sign off, cozy office bokeh, warm glow, friendly proud face, vibrant family-film color grade. Aspect Ratio 9:16.
